pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees.
pricing.promoCode: Have a promotion code? You can enter it at checkout

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for small businesses and single entrepreneurs

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: Best for agencies and growing businesses

creditSystem.title: Understanding Credits
creditSystem.subtitle: Simple, transparent pricing for all your content generation needs
creditSystem.description: Generate high, medium, or low quality images - all cost the same 1 credit. Choose the quality that fits your needs.
creditSystem.rollover: Credits roll over monthly - unused credits are added to your next billing cycle. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.

comparison.title: Detailed Feature Comparison
comparison.subtitle: Compare all features across our plans to find the perfect fit for your needs.

comparisonTable.title: Detailed Feature Comparison
comparisonTable.subtitle: Compare all features across our plans to find the perfect fit for your needs.

questions.question: Can I change plans anytime?
questions.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.

questions.question: Do unused credits roll over?
questions.answer: Yes! Unused credits roll over to the next month. We believe in fair pricing - you keep what you don't use.

questions.question: What's the difference between yearly and monthly billing?
questions.answer: Yearly plans save you 2 months - you pay for 10 months and get 12 months of service.

questions.question: What are scenarios?
questions.answer: Scenarios are pre-designed UGC settings tailored to your product and niche. For example: a cosmetic placed on a backstage table at a fashion show.

questions.question: What happens if I exceed my credit limit?
questions.answer: If you run out of credits, you can upgrade your plan or wait for the next billing cycle when new credits are added to your account.

questions.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
questions.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and digital wallets through our secure Stripe payment processing.

questions.question: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
questions.answer: Every new user starts with our generous Free plan (10 credits) to try our service. Upgrade anytime to unlock more features.

questions.question: Can I use the generated images commercially?
questions.answer: Commercial usage rights are included with Starter, Plus, and Pro plans. Free trial users have personal use rights only.

questions.question: How does the credit system work?
questions.answer: Each image generation costs 1 credit, regardless of quality. Unused credits roll over monthly with your subscription.

productImage.title: Product Image
productImage.subtitle: Upload an image of your product for analysis
productImage.tooltip: Upload a sharp, high-quality image of your product. The AI will analyze it to understand what you sell and suggest relevant scenarios.
productImage.supportedFormats: PNG, JPG up to 10 MB • Click or drag & drop

productDetails.title: Product characteristics (optional)
productDetails.subtitle: Provide a few details about how your product is used.
productDetails.placeholder: E.g.: sleeves to the elbows, neckline slightly below the neck, hat with 3 cm brim…
productDetails.tooltip: Describe how your product is used or how it fits on people. This helps Genius position the product correctly.

desireAudience.title: Desired target audience (required)
desireAudience.subtitle: Describe as precisely as possible the target audience you want to present your product to.
desireAudience.placeholder: E.g.: elite athletes, outdoor adventurers, busy professionals, elegant women…
desireAudience.tooltip: Describe who should use your product. This helps Genius generate relevant scenarios for your target audience.

scenarios.subtitle: AI-generated content ideas for your product
scenarios.tooltip: Choose from AI-generated scenarios showing your product in realistic, engaging situations.
scenarios.customPlaceholder: Describe your custom UGC scenario... e.g., 'A person on a morning jog stops to drink from the bottle, showing it prominently with a city park in the background'
scenarios.emptyState: Upload your product image and describe your audience to generate scenarios.

generationSettings.title: Image Settings
generationSettings.subtitle: Customize your output preferences
generationSettings.tooltip: Adjust these settings to control the style, quality, and format of generated images.

numImages.title: Number of Images
numImages.tooltip: Choose how many variants to generate. More images = more options but more credits.

imageQuality.title: Image Quality
imageQuality.tooltip: Higher quality yields better results but costs more credits. Low=1, Medium=2, High=3 per image.

orientation.title: Image Orientation
orientation.tooltip: Choose the aspect ratio based on intended use.
orientation.sourceDesc: Keep the image’s original proportions and dimensions (no cropping)

qualitySettings.title: Quality
qualitySettings.tooltip: Better quality uses more credits but delivers better results

ugc.freePlanLimited: Free plan limited to 1 image per generation.

timeOfDay.title: Time of Day
timeOfDay.tooltip: Controls the lighting mood of the generated images.

highlight.title: Product Focus
highlight.tooltip: Choose to foreground the product or integrate it naturally in the scene.

style.title: Visual Style
style.tooltip: Defines the overall aesthetic and mood of generated images.

needMoreHelp.title: Need more help?
needMoreHelp.description: Explore other resources or contact support

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: How can we help?
faq.description: Search our knowledge base or browse the categories below

changeEmail.q: Can I change my email address?
changeEmail.a: Yes. You can update it in account settings: Account > Settings > Profile Information.

resetPassword.q: How do I reset my password?
resetPassword.a: Click “Forgot password” on the login page, enter your email, and we’ll send a reset link.

contentTypes.q: What types of content can I create?
contentTypes.a: Genius UGC lets you create various user-generated content: social posts, product placements, positioning, and marketing assets using AI tools.

aiGeneration.a: Our AI analyzes your prompts and preferences to generate relevant, high-quality content. You can customize lighting, style, and format.

editContent.a: Not for now. We’re developing ProduktPix to become the #1 mobile marketing agent to help you sell quickly and effectively.

fileFormats.a: We support popular formats, including JPG and PNG for images, and various text formats for written content.

paymentMethods.q: Which payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.a: We accept major cards: Visa, MasterCard, and American Express.

cancelSubscription.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
cancelSubscription.a: Yes. You can cancel anytime in billing settings. Access continues until the end of the current period.

refunds.a: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for new subscribers. Contact support if you’re not satisfied.

usageLimit.q: What happens when I reach my usage limit?
usageLimit.a: You can upgrade to a higher plan or wait for the next billing cycle.

generationTime.a: It depends on complexity and server load. Most complete in 30–60 seconds. If it takes longer, try refreshing the page.

contentMismatch.q: The generated content doesn’t match my request
contentMismatch.a: Be more specific about details and audience. Include use case, size, niche, and requirements.

mobileSupport.q: Can I use the platform on mobile?
mobileSupport.a: Yes. Genius UGC is fully responsive and works on mobile, tablet, and desktop.

reportBug.q: How do I report a bug?
reportBug.a: Use our contact form or email us. Describe what you were doing when the issue occurred.

noResults.title: No results
noResults.description: Adjust your search terms or browse all categories

stillNeedHelp.title: Still need help?
stillNeedHelp.description: Can’t find what you’re looking for? Our support team is here to help.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about ProduktPix

q1.question: What is ProduktPix?
q1.answer: ProduktPix is an AI-powered platform that transforms simple product photos into professional e-commerce images. Just upload a photo and our AI creates stunning visuals in seconds.

q2.question: Do I need photography skills?
q2.answer: No! Just take a basic photo with your smartphone. Our AI handles lighting, backgrounds, and professional styling automatically.

q3.question: How many images can I create?
q3.answer: Free users get 10 credits to start. Paid plans offer 80-400+ credits per month. Each image costs 1 credit regardless of quality.

q4.question: Can I use images commercially?
q4.answer: Yes! All paid plans include full commercial usage rights. Use your images on any marketplace, website, or advertising platform.

q5.question: How fast is the generation?
q5.answer: Most images are generated in under 30 seconds. Complex scenarios may take slightly longer.

hero.headline: Earn recurring commissions by recommending
hero.subheadline: Get 25% recurring commission for each active customer you refer — for 12 months.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to start earning recurring commissions
howItWorks.step1Desc: Share your exclusive link or code with your audience.
howItWorks.step2Desc: When someone creates an account and subscribes to a paid plan, the conversion is linked to you.
howItWorks.step3Desc: You receive 25% monthly commission while the customer stays active (up to 12 months).

commission.title: Commission Details
commission.subtitle: Full transparency on how payments work
commission.bullet2: Commission valid for up to 12 months
commission.example: If you refer 10 customers on the Plus plan (€49/month), you can earn up to €147/month in recurring commissions.
